{{CargoRelic
|name=Lunar Soil Specimen
|class_id=20367
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=This seemingly insignificant piece of soil is a precious specimen collected from the moon. It contains a lot of valuable information about the moon and has extremely high scientific research value. Scientists all over the world wish to possess it.
|fame=14
|art=18
|fth=13
|civ=14
|tech=31
|ss1=Per 500 TECH, Snail DEF +1<br>TECH: 15000/15000
|ss2=Per 500 TECH, Snail DEF +2<br>TECH: 15000/15000
|ss3=Per 500 TECH, Snail DEF +3<br>TECH: 15000/15000
|ss4=Per 500 TECH, Snail DEF +3<br>TECH: 15000/15000
|ss7=Per 500 TECH, Snail DEF +3<br>TECH: 15000/15000<br> (Awakened)
}}
